summary: Comprehensive testing of 5 quick-win improvements for 'Народный Контроль' app (Iteration 7). All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested successfully. Features tested: Interactive onboarding (3 steps), Verification feed (/verify page), Social sharing (Telegram/VK/WhatsApp + copy link), Adaptive verification timer (72h→12h based on user count), Daily missions + streak system.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/onboarding/status requires auth (returns 401)
Backend: GET /api/onboarding/status returns completed/step for authenticated user
Backend: POST /api/onboarding/complete requires auth (returns 401)
Backend: POST /api/onboarding/complete updates onboarding status
Backend: GET /api/reviews/pending-verification requires auth (returns 401)
Backend: GET /api/reviews/pending-verification returns pending reviews NOT authored by current user
Backend: GET /api/reviews/pending-verification is NOT caught by /reviews/{review_id} route
Backend: GET /api/missions/daily requires auth (returns 401)
Backend: GET /api/missions/daily returns missions array and streak count
Backend: POST /api/missions/{mission_id}/progress requires auth (returns 401)
Backend: POST /api/missions/{mission_id}/progress increments progress
Backend: POST /api/missions/{mission_id}/claim requires auth (returns 401)
Backend: POST /api/missions/{mission_id}/claim returns 404 for invalid mission
Backend: GET /api/reviews/{review_id}/public returns approved review without auth
Backend: GET /api/reviews/{review_id}/public returns 404 for non-approved reviews
Backend: Review creation uses adaptive timer (72h when <50 users)
Backend: GET /api/news still works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/widgets/weather still works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/widgets/currency still works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/support/faq still works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/legal/info still works (regression)
Frontend: Login page has consent checkbox (data-testid='consent-checkbox')
Frontend: Login page has age checkbox (data-testid='age-checkbox')
Frontend: Google login button is DISABLED when checkboxes unchecked
Frontend: Google login button is ENABLED after checking both boxes
Frontend: Cookie banner visible (data-testid='cookie-banner')
Frontend: /terms page accessible without auth
Frontend: /privacy page accessible without auth
Frontend: /verify route redirects to login when not authenticated
Frontend: /support route redirects to login when not authenticated
Frontend: Dashboard shows onboarding modal for new users (data-testid='onboarding-modal')
Frontend: Onboarding modal has next button (data-testid='onboarding-next-btn')
Frontend: Onboarding modal has skip button (data-testid='onboarding-skip-btn')
Frontend: Dashboard shows daily missions widget (data-testid='daily-missions')
Frontend: Dashboard shows streak badge (data-testid='streak-badge')
Frontend: Dashboard has 'Помочь проверить' quick action card (data-testid='quick-verify')
Frontend: Navigation sidebar has 'Проверить' link to /verify
Frontend: Verify feed page exists (data-testid='verify-feed-page')
Frontend: Verify feed page shows info banner (data-testid='verify-info-banner')
Frontend: Verify feed page shows pending reviews to verify
Frontend: Review detail page has share button (data-testid='share-btn')
Frontend: Share popup shows Telegram link (data-testid='share-telegram')
Frontend: Share popup shows VK link (data-testid='share-vk')
Frontend: Share popup shows WhatsApp link (data-testid='share-whatsapp')
Frontend: Share popup shows copy link button (data-testid='share-copy-link')
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing ShareButton import in ReviewDetailPage.js - was causing runtime error
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for new features
Onboarding modal correctly triggers when onboarding_completed is false
Daily missions auto-generate 3 missions per user per day
Adaptive timer correctly calculates expiry based on user count (<50=72h, <200=48h, <1000=24h, 1000+=12h)
Verify feed correctly excludes user's own reviews and already-verified reviews
Public review endpoint correctly returns only approved reviews
Streak system increments on consecutive daily visits
seed_data_creation: Created test user 'test_user_iteration7' with onboarding_completed=false to test onboarding modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 quick-win improvements are fully functional. Test session token: test_session_iteration7_token. Test user: test_user_iteration7 (100 points, streak=3). Fixed ShareButton import in ReviewDetailPage.js. Onboarding modal appears when onboarding_completed is false. Daily missions: verify (2 reviews), read_news (3 articles), visit_map (1 visit). Adaptive timer: <50 users = 72h expiry. Share popup has Telegram/VK/WhatsApp links + copy button.
